news_items.headline: Yankees use 13-run third inning to beat Athletics 13-8
news_items.summary: The Yankees got the first 12 batters on in the inning against A’s pitchers Jacob Lopez and Michael Kelly, marking the first time they pulled that off in nearly 77 years.

news_items.headline: Yoshinobu Yamamoto helps Dodgers deliver a birthday win for Dave Roberts
news_items.summary: Yoshinobu Yamamoto gives up four hits and strikes out 10 over 5⅓ shutout innings and Ryan Ward and Max Muncy each hit home runs in a win over the Phillies.

news_items.headline: Giants 19, Rockies 6: A blowout loss brings May to a merciful end
news_items.summary: The Rockies fell to the Giants in a long and grueling blowout.

news_items.headline: Yamamoto racks up 10 K's while holding Phillies scoreless
To Live and Lose in L.A.: Dodgers 9, Phillies 1
news_items.summary: The “Yama” in Yamamoto means mountain, and the Phillies couldn’t climb it.

news_items.headline: Yoshinobu Yamamoto stifles Phillies as Dodgers take the series
news_items.summary: Yamamoto strikes out season-high 10 hitters, Dodgers crush three home runs in 9-1 victory over Phillies.
